title: Hanshu: Book of Han (Ban Gu), Selection 3
description: From Hanshu: Book of Han (Ban Gu): chapter 3
introduction: From Hanshu: Book of Han (Ban Gu): chapter 3

translation.text: From Hanshu: Book of Han (Ban Gu): A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
